decision: Gate F passed for local provider adapter activation.
summary: Reviewed the provider adapter kernel activation proposal and confirmed it only unlocks local/API-compatible stub-backed provider adapter implementation with raw+parsed evidence, drift detection, and zero expected cost.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to phase5.provider-adapter-kernel. Keep real paid provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, external repo mutation, deploy, PR creation, yellow auto-approval, and production side effects out of scope.
notes: Gate F only unlocks a local stub-backed provider adapter kernel.
